prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次分别为约8299名→19091名→8769名→4937名→10176名，波动剧烈。2022年因断档位次大幅后移至19091名，2023–2024年快 速回升至4937名，2025年又回落至10176名，近两年呈\"V型反弹后回调\"走势，2025年基准约10176名；该校在山西省物理类招生计划2021年261人、2022年260 人、2023年253人、2024年252人、2025年262人；2026年计划246人，较2025年减少16人（约-6.1%），属小幅缩招，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学为985工程、 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第26名，近年稳定在24–27名区间，属于国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价为\"明显负面\"，主要涉 及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴池事件）和学术不端舆情，共13条负面信号；抖音热度排名第40（较热），短视频曝光量中等；2022–2025年多次出现投档线异常信号（河南、江苏 、黑龙江等省份断档），对报考心理有滞后影响；吉林大学拥有15个A-及以上学科：考古学A+、马克思主义理论A+、化学A、法学A、数学A、物理学A、机械工程 A、兽医学A、哲学A-、工商管理A-、政治学A-、材料科学与工程A-、生物学A-、电子科学与技术A-、计算机科学与技术A-，学科覆盖面广，综合实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等热门专业持续高热，与吉大优势学科高度匹配；法学热度分化但仍是文科热门；山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较202 5年减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓和；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，距山西省较远，属于跨省就读；该校在山西省招生占比约5 %（2025年全校总招生约3581人中山西171人），非主要生源地，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10176名、2026年物理类计划缩招16人（位次数 字减小方向）、山西省物理类考生减少约3.4%（竞争略缓）、声誉负面信号可能抑制部分报考热情、抖音热度较热维持一定关注度，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅前移（更易 进）。预测最低位次约9753名，区间9253–10253名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 8299 → 19091 → 8769 → 4937 → 10176, with drastic fluctuations. In 2022, due to a gap, the ranking significantly dropped to 19091, then quickly rebounded to 4937 in 2023–2024, and fell back to 10176 in 2025, showing a 'V-shaped rebound followed by a pullback' trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 10176 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shanxi Province was 261 in 2021, 260 in 2022, 253 in 2023, 252 in 2024, and 262 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 246, a decrease of 16 (about -6.1%) from 2025, a slight reduction, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 26th, stable in the 24–27 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving campus safety incidents (Qianwei Campus Bathroom Incident) and academic misconduct rumors, totaling 13 negative signals. Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. From 2022 to 2025, there have been multiple abnormal signals in admission lines (gaps in Henan, Jiangsu, Heilongjiang and other provinces), having a lagging impact on application psychology. Jilin University has 15 A- or above disciplines: Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chemistry A, Law A, Mathematics A, Physics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A, Philosophy A-, Business Administration A-, Political Science A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, with a wide disciplinary coverage and outstanding comprehensive strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine continue to be highly sought after, closely matching Jilin University's advantageous disciplines. Law is polarized but remains a popular liberal arts major. In 2026, there are approximately 167,419 Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% from 2025, slightly easing competition. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, far from Shanxi Province, requiring cross-province study. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 5% (171 out of about 3581 total enrollment in 2025), not a major source province, with neutral regional preference impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10176, the 2026 Physics Category plan reduction of 16 (ranking number decreasing direction), the decrease of about 3.4% in Shanxi Physics Category examinees (slightly eased competition), negative reputation signals possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and relatively hot Douyin popularity maintaining some attention, it is predicted that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 9753, with a range of 9253–10253.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9253), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
